case_title: NGUYEN, CINDY et al vs. LEE, JIMMY et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-10-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-10-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND OSC FOR PLAINTIFF., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-31-1995 CONTINUED FROM OCT-10-1995 TO NOV-09-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-25-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER ACTION. HEARING SET FOR OCT-10-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, CINDY GREENWICH, TONY MCGOVERN, MARY KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JIMMY DOES 1 TO 60 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-25-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-26-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-07-1995
